backendHealth.hint: Start the backend: `dotnet run` inside backend/

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.heroSub: Dictate or drop audio — I'll shape it into notes.
dashboard.dropzonePrompt: Drop audio here or click to pick files
dashboard.dropzoneHint: Accepts mp3 / m4a / wav / mp4 / ogg / flac
dashboard.empty: No recordings yet — import or record your first one.

queue.title: Processing queue
queue.empty: Queue is empty. Import a recording to start processing.

profiles.title: Processing profiles
profiles.deleteConfirm: Delete profile "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

bindings.title: Per-app bindings
bindings.hint: Which profile to use when each app is focused. macOS bundle id → profile.

settings.title: Settings
settings.tokenHint: Stored locally in SQLite. Never leaves your machine except to the configured endpoint.

lmStudio.hintReachable: Models loaded in LM Studio right now. Pick one to route all LLM calls through it.
lmStudio.hintOffline: LM Studio is not responding at the endpoint above. Start it and click Retry.
lmStudio.suggestedHint: Curated starting points — clicking opens the model page inside LM Studio.
lmStudio.empty: Install LM Studio to manage local models —
lmStudio.noLoaded: LM Studio is up but no models are loaded yet.

models.title: Local models
models.subtitle: Read-only list of Whisper/VAD files under AppPaths.Models. Use LM Studio for LLM downloads.
models.openInLmStudioHint: Need more models? Open LM Studio.

obsidian.title: Obsidian vault
obsidian.setupHint: Pick which folders to create in your vault. Content stays yours.
obsidian.templateHint: We drop a Mozgoslav Templater template if Templates is on.
obsidian.tagsHint: Tags appended to every new note's frontmatter.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Mozgoslav
onboarding.subtitle: Quick setup so your first call works out of the box.

step2.title: Models
step2.hint: Grab Whisper + VAD — one time, ~1.5 GB.

step3.title: Obsidian
step3.hint: Pick your vault; we'll prepare folders.

step4.title: LLM
step4.hint: Local LM Studio or Ollama endpoint.

step5.title: Microphone access
step5.hint: Mozgoslav needs the microphone to transcribe when you press mouse button 5. macOS shows the prompt on first use; you can enable it proactively here.

step6.title: Accessibility
step6.hint: Inserting text into the focused app (VSCode, Slack, Mail) requires Accessibility. Open Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility and add Mozgoslav.

step7.title: Input Monitoring
step7.hint: Watching mouse button 5 globally needs Input Monitoring. Open Settings → Privacy & Security → Input Monitoring and add Mozgoslav.

step8.title: Ready
step8.hint: All set. Import your first conversation or dictate with mouse button 5.

logs.title: Logs
logs.empty: No log lines yet — run the pipeline.

backup.title: Backups
backup.empty: No backups yet. One click and you're covered.

batch.hintPlaceholder: e.g. Q2 planning call, Ivan and Olga
